title: Vaginal discharge documentation

red_flags.text: Specifies discharge character, itching, soreness, dyspareunia, dysuria, onset, duration, recurrence, menstrual and abnormal bleeding, pregnancy, medical, medication, and sexual history.
red_flags.rationale: Supports entered discharge, itching and associated history.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Specifies discharge character, itching, soreness, dyspareunia, dysuria, onset, duration, recurrence, menstrual and abnormal bleeding, pregnancy, medical, medication, and sexual history.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Vaginal Candidiasis – 10

red_flags.text: Lists lower abdominal pain with fever, foul-smelling or blood-stained discharge, postcoital bleeding, intermenstrual bleeding, and recent-partner context.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists lower abdominal pain with fever, foul-smelling or blood-stained discharge, postcoital bleeding, intermenstrual bleeding, and recent-partner context.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Vaginal Candidiasis – 10

red_flags.text: Defines when microscopy or culture is not routine, when targeted culture is appropriate, and when pregnancy, systemic illness, atypical symptoms, recurrence, bleeding, or lower abdominal pain require face-to-face or specialist review.
red_flags.rationale: Supports clinician-selected investigation and referral documentation.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines when microscopy or culture is not routine, when targeted culture is appropriate, and when pregnancy, systemic illness, atypical symptoms, recurrence, bleeding, or lower abdominal pain require face-to-face or specialist review.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Vaginal Candidiasis – 10

medication.text: Defines the Dubai telehealth population and diabetes, antibiotic, estrogen, pregnancy, immunosuppression, medication, and device risk contexts.
medication.rationale: Supports direct Dubai telehealth risk and scope context for possible vulvovaginal candidiasis.
medication.evidence_extract: Defines the Dubai telehealth population and diabetes, antibiotic, estrogen, pregnancy, immunosuppression, medication, and device risk contexts.

source_limitations: Discharge, odour, itch, pain, bleeding, pregnancy, exposure, examination and tests are absent.
No candidiasis, STI, test, medicine or referral is generated.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
